name: Chocolate Sin Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Melt chocolate chips with syrup in a double boiler.
5. Mix melted chocolate into the butter mixture.
6. Gradually add remaining ingredients (applesauce, vanilla, almond extract, baking soda, salt) to the batter and blend until smooth.
7. Pour batter into a greased 10-inch bundt pan or round pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cake to cool completely before removing from the pan.
This cake is very moist and can be enjoyed on its own, but whipped cream pairs well with it.
